message.content:
@startuml
title Edit pet owner details
actor "Vet_Central" as Vet_Central
participant "petOwner_dialog" as petOwner_dialog
database "Database" as Database
participant "GoogleMapAPI" as GoogleMapAPI

Vet_Central -> petOwner_dialog: 1 extract person Id from routes
petOwner_dialog -> Database: 2 fetchUserDetail(personId)
Database --> petOwner_dialog: 3 (personDetails)
petOwner_dialog -> petOwner_dialog: 4 setState(personDetails and disable editable form field)
opt [if person detail has address]
    petOwner_dialog -> GoogleMapAPI: 5 geoCodeByPlaceId(place id from db)
    GoogleMapAPI --> petOwner_dialog: 6 (formatted_address)
end
petOwner_dialog --> Vet_Central: 7 render()
@enduml
